text.title: Router Shadow Deploy — Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for shadow-report.yaml and the promotion-decision artefact. The promote-gate script consumes the report; humans co-sign the decision.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Extend window beyond 7 days when seasonal traffic is expected (end-of-month, holiday).
Reduce sample threshold for low-volume intents only if the intent has <5% of traffic AND a compensating analysis is attached.
Promote at lower than 100% schema parity ONLY if the divergence is additive (new optional fields) AND consumers are explicitly migrated.

list.item: Window ≥7 days; sample count ≥1000; all intent classes covered
Cost delta within ±10% or explicit approval recorded
Per-intent metrics within the acceptance contract
Promotion decision signed by ml_engineer + sponsor
Rollback runbook referenced and rollback owner named
